text.message: Didn’t expect that to be open.
Couldn’t leave it for him.  Way too strong.
Tbh I thought green was 6 3 11 for sure
But good on him to sacrifice himself for the board
He seems desperate for you not to steal
I just call it like I see it
two cards is no game here
i messed up with the block
I thought you were just being petty
Blue you need to fight road probably.
I need to connect just in case black has 3 vps
I don’t also have no cards
I have a yop but no good play for it yet
Even if I take road o don’t win I’m
I didn’t plan on you taking road
Blue I can help you extend
Not even no whole hand why blue?
Because I can’t trade for something you’re offering
I can’t trade a brick for brick
I have one wood two brick
